mapper.select: SELECT session_id, tenant_id, title, preparation_mode, status, created_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_owners_assembly_session WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, session_id DESC
SELECT p.* FROM t_owners_assembly_package p JOIN t_owners_assembly_subject s ON s.package_id = p.package_id WHERE s.subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_owners_assembly_subject(package_id, tenant_id, subject_id) VALUES (#{packageId}, #{tenantId}, #{subjectId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_owners_assembly_package SET status = 'PUBLIC_NOTICE', package_hash = #{packageHash}, public_notice_start_at = #{publicNoticeStartAt}, public_notice_end_at = #{publicNoticeEndAt}, locked_by_user_id = #{lockedByUserId}, locked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'PACKAGE_DRAFT'
